category_sources: Official documentation at https://www.libjpeg-turbo.org/Documentation/Documentation documents libjpeg and TurboJPEG APIs and JPEG programs.
source_facts.description says 'JPEG image codec that aids compression and decompression'.
display_name_sources: Official repository is https://github.com/libjpeg-turbo/libjpeg-turbo and uses the project name libjpeg-turbo.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is linked by the official docs as the latest README.
Official libjpeg-turbo documentation page is a dedicated official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/libjpeg-turbo/libjpeg-turbo, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official documentation covers libjpeg API, cjpeg/djpeg/jpegtran programs, and TurboJPEG C and Java APIs.
